name: Exclusive Complimentary Webinar: Master Hybrid Project Management
description:
Project management is evolving. Organizations today need the flexibility of Agile and the structure of Predictive approaches to deliver successful outcomes in an increasingly complex business environment.

[Join this exclusive complimentary webinar](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/hybrid-project-management-agile-predictive-strategies?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=pmi_fy26_q2&utm_content=webinars&utm_term=sks) to discover how leading organizations are leveraging Hybrid Project Management to improve delivery speed, strengthen governance, enhance stakeholder engagement, and drive business value.

𝗪𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝗬𝗼𝘂'𝗹𝗹 𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗹𝗼𝗿𝗲:
• Why Hybrid Project Management is becoming the new enterprise standard
• How Agile and Predictive methodologies work together to improve outcomes
• Emerging project management trends shaping the future of work
• In-demand certifications including PMP®, PMI-ACP®, CAPM®, and PgMP®
• Career growth opportunities for modern project professionals.

Seats are limited. Register now to secure your place -[ Link](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/hybrid-project-management-agile-predictive-strategies?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=pmi_fy26_q2&utm_content=webinars&utm_term=sks)

Discover what the future of project management looks like-and how you can position yourself for success in a rapidly changing business landscape.

name: AI+ Executive Masterclass: AI Strategy, Business Use Cases & Leadership
description:
Artificial Intelligence is becoming a key driver of business innovation, operational efficiency, and competitive advantage. As organizations accelerate AI adoption, leaders need practical strategies to identify opportunities, implement solutions, and drive measurable business outcomes.

In this AI+ Executive Masterclass, you'll explore how Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Generative AI are transforming modern organizations. Learn how businesses are leveraging AI to improve decision-making, streamline operations, enhance customer experiences, and increase workforce productivity through real-world use cases and practical implementation frameworks.

The session will also cover AI strategy, Responsible AI, governance, risk management, and key considerations for successful enterprise AI adoption. Gain actionable insights to help lead AI-driven transformation and create long-term business value.

**[Register now to learn how AI can drive innovation, efficiency, and sustainable growth across your organization.](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/ai_executive_masterclass_ai_strategy_business_use_cases_and_leadership?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=aicerts_fy26_q2&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term=at)**

name: Production-Ready AI Agents with Gemini 3.1 Pro
description:
Learn how autonomous AI systems can reason, act, and scale across enterprise workflows.

**[Production-Ready AI Agents with Gemini 3.1 Pro](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/production-ready-ai-agents-building-on-google-agent-platform-with-gemini-3.1-pro?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term=shubhra)**

AI is moving beyond simple prompts to autonomous execution. In this session, explore how organizations can build production-ready AI agents using Google’s Agent Platform powered by Gemini 3.1 Pro.

You’ll see how intelligent agents can understand context, make decisions, interact with APIs, and automate complex business processes. From architecture design to deployment strategies, this masterclass will walk through real-world approaches to building scalable, enterprise-grade agentic systems.

name: Modern Security Strategies for Today's IT Environment
description:
### [Zero Trust Security: Building a Robust Defense Framework](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/zero-trust-security-building-robust-defense-framework?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_campaign=cisco_fy26_q2&utm_content=organic_listing&utm_term=om)

As organizations embrace cloud, remote work, AI, and digital transformation, securing users, devices, applications, and data has become more challenging than ever. **A Zero Trust approach** is helping organizations strengthen security, reduce risk, and build more resilient IT environments.

Join this **[free masterclass](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/zero-trust-security-building-robust-defense-framework?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_campaign=cisco_fy26_q2&utm_content=organic_listing&utm_term=om)** to explore the fundamentals of Zero Trust Security and learn how modern organizations are adapting their security strategies to address today's evolving threats.

**Book Your Free Seat Now - [Link](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/zero-trust-security-building-robust-defense-framework?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_campaign=cisco_fy26_q2&utm_content=organic_listing&utm_term=om)**

### In This Session, You'll Learn:

• The core principles of Zero Trust Security
• Why organizations are moving beyond traditional security models
• Strategies for securing users, devices, applications, and data
• Modern technologies that support a Zero Trust framework
• Real-world use cases and industry best practices

### Featured Speaker

**Westley Van Straten** – *Cybersecurity and Network Infrastructure Instructor with over 20 years of industry experience.*

📅 **June 22, 2026**
🕛 **12:00 PM ET**
💲 **Free**

Whether you work in IT, cybersecurity, networking, cloud, infrastructure, or technology leadership, this session will provide valuable insights into one of the most important security strategies shaping today's digital enterprise.

**Reserve your spot today and join us for this interactive learning experience - [Click Here](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/zero-trust-security-building-robust-defense-framework?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_campaign=cisco_fy26_q2&utm_content=organic_listing&utm_term=om)**
